title: Smoky Roasted Tofu Chinese Stir-fry
description: A fluffy and bitter meal-prep friendly Chinese dish featuring roasted tofu, lemongrass stalks, and a smoky flavor profile, perfect for breakfast or lunch.

ingredients.name: 2 cups shredded spring onions (green part only)
5 lemongrass stalks, tough outer layer removed
1 tablespoon dark brown sugar or maple syrup

instructions: In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, brown sugar, and five-spice powder (if using). Set aside.
Place tofu on a baking sheet. Drizzle with oil and season lightly with salt and pepper.
Roast in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
In a large skillet over medium heat, add diced onion and garlic. Sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add ginger to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Stir-fry shredded spring onions, lemongrass (chopped), and roasted tofu together in the skillet. Pour in sauce mixture and broth. Stir well to combine.
Simmer for another 3-4 minutes until slightly thickened.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
